body_txt: Also known as " Fuck then fuck off ". Two characters have sex. Upon waking the next morning, the woman reaches out for her man. The camera follows her hand to the empty pillow; he has flown in the night. Usually a man does the loving and leaving, but women do it too. The scene is a sad one, the root of the sadness perhaps being the broken link between sex and love/commitment . The broken link is highlighted by the furtive, even guilty, departure. A common subversion is to have the missing lover show up seconds later with coffee or breakfast for two . Alternatively, the missing partner just had stuff to do and is fully planning to come back later . On occasion the desertion will be shown; time for moonlit regret, lingering last looks of her sleeping face. Sometimes the man is leaving on a mission. Added pathos points if the man is going to his death . In this case, he will often have left something (or someone ) behind. Contrast: Breakfast in Bed , when one serves their lover breakfast upon waking up in bed; Bedmate Reveal .
